title: PumpkinPVPReloaded
description:
Add special exploding pumpkins to your server to be used in pvp.
Highly customizable!
body:
# PumpkinPVP
[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/Z8Z3RVMAJ) [![Discord](https://dcbadge.vercel.app/api/server/3UgsYf3qyc?theme=blurple)](https://discord.gg/3UgsYf3qyc)
### Highly customizable exploding pumpkins for spooky halloween crystal-pvp. Features: - customize every aspect of the pumpkin explosion itself (power, fire, blockbreak, effects, etc.) - fully customizable explosion trigger mechanics for pumpkin explosions - toggle and configure possible required base blocks for explosions - fully customizable death sounds when a player was killed using a pumpkin - fully customizable firework effects on pumpkin explosion in cool halloween themed default colors - fully customizable lightning effects on pumpkin damage by another player - ability to enable the plugin only in specific worlds - ability to rate-limit pumpkin explosions on servers that allow utility clients - PrePumpkinExplodeEvent and PostPumpkinExplodeEvent that can be used to extend the functionality further with your own code Registers killer and victim for both vanilla and custom death messages. ### Found a bug or got an idea for an enhancement? Open an issue or join the [discord](https://discord.com/invite/3UgsYf3qyc)!
